Entity.description: A generic entity in the graph (default).

Decision.description: A specialized node recording a choice made.

Breakthrough.description: A key realization or moment of insight.

Analogy.description: A comparison used to explain a concept.

Observation.description: A piece of empirical evidence or note.

Bottle.description: A timestamped note to your future self (Message in a Bottle).

Procedure.description: A learned process or protocol with ordered steps.

E2E_TestType.description: A test memory type created during E2E validation
